verification_gate: All child tasks complete with passing proof records; no child draft; lane acceptance satisfied.

gate_result.children_evidence: ARCHBP-058 (two-brother model, 4/4), ARCHBP-059 (tier map, 6/6), ARCHBP-060 (shared-kernel boundary, 3/3), ARCHBP-061 (invariant ledger I01..I17, 5/5), ARCHBP-062 (CT-G1..CT-G10 conformance tests, 3/3), ARCHBP-063 (failure-mode catalog FM-01..FM-08 + 2026-07-21 incident, 5/5), and ARCHBP-064 (ratified v1.0.0 publication, 4/4) each carry a passing revision-1 proof record in this ledger.
gate_result.draft_evidence: All seven children moved red (a82c166) to green in the same lane delivery; none remains draft, simulated, or partially satisfied.
gate_result.acceptance_evidence: The T1 rollup acceptance holds: the isolation architecture spec v1.0.0 is ratified and versioned with its invariant ledger, tier map, and failure-mode catalog; the invariant ledger is merged as normative and referenced by the conformance tests; and all ten yzx-iso lane indexes in GitKB reference the published spec so T2-T10 have a stable authority.
gate_result.full_suite: Lane specs 30/30 across seven gate files.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: The rollup aggregates seven executed child gates that validate the real published artifacts; no child was accepted on assertion.

proof_summary: ARCHBP-049 is complete: the isolation architecture spec and invariant ledger lane rolled up with all seven children (ARCHBP-058..064) complete and green — the ratified v1.0.0 spec, the normative I01..I17 invariant ledger, the exhaustive runtime tier map under the nothing-durable-on-host-run rule, the CT-G1..CT-G10 per-goal conformance tests, and the FM-01..FM-08 failure-mode catalog embedding the 2026-07-21 incident are published and versioned in planning-spine-v0/docs, and all ten yzx-iso lane indexes reference the spec as their stable authority.
